completed_tasks.name: Define typed runtime errors and execution options
completed_tasks.progress: Added `cintxRsError` in `cintx-core`, re-exported it, and created `ExecutionOptions` in `cintx-runtime`.

completed_tasks.name: Implement validator/planner/workspace contract
completed_tasks.progress: Added validator/planner/workspace modules, runtime tests, workspace membership, and verification passes. Rust review then blocked finalization on three issues in chunk planning, query/evaluate contract consistency, and typed validation errors.

remaining_tasks.name: Implement validator/planner/workspace contract
remaining: Fix `ChunkPlanner::plan` so `chunk_size_override` cannot under-allocate a chunk under a memory cap.
Make `evaluate` use the queried workspace contract or reject mismatched planning options instead of silently re-planning.
Replace the bad-shell-atom-index `ChunkPlanFailed` path with a dedicated typed validation error.
Re-run `cargo test --workspace`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`, and `cargo fmt --all -- --check`.
Write `02-PLAN-SUMMARY.md` and commit the code/docs once review findings are fixed.

blockers.description: Mandatory Rust review returned BLOCK on the current uncommitted Plan 02 changes.
blockers.workaround: Address the three findings before committing: chunk-size override fit calculation, query/evaluate contract drift, and typed invalid-shell-index error handling.

decisions.decision: Add `crates/cintx-runtime` to the root workspace/default-members now.
decisions.rationale: Phase 01 Plan 02 verification explicitly depends on `cargo test -p cintx-runtime --lib` and workspace-wide Rust gates.

decisions.decision: Keep typed runtime errors in `cintx-core` and route runtime validation/planner failures through them.
decisions.rationale: This matches the Phase 01 requirement that downstream callers see typed contracts instead of ad-hoc planner errors.

decisions.decision: Use manifest-driven resolver metadata to estimate workspace and validate shell tuples.
decisions.rationale: Phase 01 depends on planner scaffolding consuming the canonical manifest instead of raw symbol names.

next_action: Start by fixing the three rust-reviewer findings in `crates/cintx-runtime/src/workspace.rs`, `crates/cintx-runtime/src/planner.rs`, and `crates/cintx-runtime/src/validator.rs`, then rerun the full Rust verification gate.
context_notes: This repo still has many pre-existing deletions/untracked files outside the current Phase 01 scope. Do not revert them. Wave 1 is already committed cleanly, including the generated-manifest formatting fix (`e43316d`). Plan 02 implementation is local-only right now: tests/clippy/fmt pass, but review blocked final commit. No background processes are running.
